sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76266" key="o)/xnh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄχνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, later way of writing <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄγχνη</foreign> (q. v.).</entryFree>
